locations.name: 東非裂谷
locations.summary: 東非裂谷 (EAR) ，是東非一個活動中的裂谷。該裂谷起源於中新世，距今2200至2500萬年前。 之後該裂谷形成了東非大裂谷並且向安那托利亞擴張。

relations.subject: Yellow-eyed black flycatcher
relations.evidence: The yellow-eyed black flycatcher (Melaenornis ardesiacus) is a small passerine bird of the genus Melaenornis in the flycatcher family Muscicapidae native to the Albertine Rift montane forests
